hooks.command: PROJECT_DIR="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$PWD}"; if command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ -f "$PROJECT_DIR/tools/session_check.py" ]; then python3 "$PROJECT_DIR/tools/session_check.py" --hook; elif [ -f "$PROJECT_DIR/bootstrap.md" ]; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "SessionStart", "additionalContext": "[未初始化] 检测到 bootstrap.md（python3 不可用）。请主动提示：请先读取 bootstrap.md 引导用户完成初始化 → 仅回复 A 或 B。完成初始化前请勿执行任何 P-E-R 操作。"}}'; else echo '{}'; fi
